title: S.Y.L Pastilhas e Sapatas de Freios ransomware incident

victim.name: S.Y.L Pastilhas e Sapatas de Freios

extortion.description: [AI generated] "S.Y.L Pastilhas e Sapatas de Freios" is a Brazilian company that specializes in the manufacture and marketing of brake pads and shoes. They provide products for a wide range of vehicles, maintaining focus on quality and performance for its customers. Besides, the company develops and executes technical and commercial training for professionals, promoting expertise in the automotive repair market.
